metadata.convention: increased = more branches than WT; decreased = fewer branches than WT; unchanged = similar to WT

evidence.title: Arabidopsis BRANCHED1 Acts as an Integrator of Branching Signals
evidence.evidence_sentence: brc1 mutants had a significantly higher number of rosette branches than wild-type plants

evidence.title: Arabidopsis BRANCHED1 Acts as an Integrator of Branching Signals
evidence.evidence_sentence: The phenotype of brc2 mutants was weaker but consistently affected RI and RII

evidence.evidence_sentence: Double mutants brc1-2 brc2-1 had a phenotype similar to that of strong brc1 mutants
